summary: Completed testing of dynamic homepage content that changes based on selected country. All tests passed - hero badge shows dynamic country name, cities section shows/hides based on country, featured businesses filter by country, and categories always display.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cities?country_code=MX returns 10 Mexican cities - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/cities?country_code=US returns empty array - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/cities default is MX - PASSED
Backend: Cities endpoint country_code is case insensitive - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/featured?country_code=MX returns Mexican businesses - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/featured?country_code=US returns empty - PASSED
Backend: Featured endpoint limit parameter works - PASSED
Backend: Featured endpoint country_code is case insensitive - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses?country_code=MX filters correctly - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses?country_code=US returns empty - PASSED
Frontend: Hero badge shows 'La plataforma #1 de reservas en México' for MX - PASSED
Frontend: Hero badge shows 'La plataforma #1 de reservas en Estados Unidos' for US - PASSED
Frontend: Cities section visible for MX with 10 city cards - PASSED
Frontend: Cities section title shows 'Ciudades en México' - PASSED
Frontend: Cities section hidden for US (no US cities) - PASSED
Frontend: Featured businesses section visible for MX - PASSED
Frontend: Featured businesses section hidden for US - PASSED
Frontend: Categories section always visible regardless of country - PASSED
Frontend: City card click navigates to /search?city={cityName} - PASSED
Frontend: Country switch reloads homepage data correctly - PASSED
Frontend: No JavaScript errors detected - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx correctly uses useCountry() hook and reloads data in useEffect when countryCode changes
Cities section conditionally renders only when cities.length > 0
Featured businesses section conditionally renders only when featuredBusinesses.length > 0
Categories section always renders regardless of country selection
Backend /api/cities endpoint correctly filters by country_code parameter
Backend /api/businesses/featured endpoint correctly filters by country_code parameter
test_credentials: No credentials needed - tested public homepage only
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (10 MX cities, 5 MX businesses)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic homepage content is fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) HomePage.jsx has useEffect that depends on countryCode from useCountry() hook, (2) When countryCode changes, it reloads categories, featured businesses, and cities, (3) Cities endpoint: GET /api/cities?country_code=MX returns 10 Mexican cities, (4) Featured endpoint: GET /api/businesses/featured?country_code=MX returns Mexican businesses, (5) Cities section has data-testid='cities-section' and only shows when cities.length > 0, (6) City cards have data-testid='city-card-{slug}' and navigate to /search?city={cityName} on click, (7) Featured section has data-testid='featured-section' and only shows when featuredBusinesses.length > 0, (8) Categories section has data-testid='categories-section' and always shows regardless of country, (9) Hero badge dynamically shows country name from useCountry().country.name
